1в†’# MMS Operational Guide
     2в†’
     3в†’## Quick Reference
     4в†’
     5в†’```bash
     6в†’# Full stack (dev)
     7в†’docker-compose up -d
     8в†’bun run dev
     9в†’
    10в†’# Tests
    11в†’bun test                    # Unit tests
    12в†’bun test:watch             # Watch mode
    13в†’bun run test:integration   # Integration (needs Docker)
    14в†’
    15в†’# Validation (run in order!)
    16в†’bun run typecheck          # TypeScript strict
    17в†’bun run lint               # ESLint
    18в†’bun run build              # Full build
    19в†’```
    20в†’
    21в†’## Validation Order (Backpressure)
    22в†’
    23в†’**IMPORTANT: Run these in order after implementing changes:**
    24в†’
    25в†’```bash
    26в†’# 1. Unit tests for changed files
    27в†’bun test <path-to-changed-file>
    28в†’
    29в†’# 2. TypeScript type checking
    30в†’bun run typecheck
    31в†’
    32в†’# 3. Linting
    33в†’bun run lint
    34в†’
    35в†’# 4. Full build
    36в†’bun run build
    37в†’
    38в†’# 5. Integration tests (if touching API/DB)
    39в†’bun run test:integration
    40в†’```
    41в†’
    42в†’All must pass before committing.
    43в†’
    44в†’## Build & Run
    45в†’
    46в†’### Development Environment
    47в†’
    48в†’```bash
    49в†’# Start infrastructure
    50в†’docker-compose up -d postgres redis minio
    51в†’
    52в†’# Install dependencies
    53в†’bun install
    54в†’
    55в†’# Run migrations
    56в†’bun run db:migrate
    57в†’
    58в†’# Seed demo data (optional)
    59в†’bun run db:seed
    60в†’
    61в†’# Start dev server
    62в†’bun run dev
    63в†’```
    64в†’
    65в†’### C++ Optimizer Build
    66в†’
    67в†’```bash
    68в†’# Prerequisites: cmake, or-tools
    69в†’cd src/optimizer
    70в†’mkdir build && cd build
    71в†’cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release
    72в†’make -j$(nproc)
    73в†’
    74в†’# Binary location: src/optimizer/build/mms-optimizer
    75в†’```
    76в†’
    77в†’### Docker Full Stack
    78в†’
    79в†’```bash
    80в†’docker-compose -f docker-compose.full.yml up -d
    81в†’
    82в†’# Services:
    83в†’# - postgres:5432
    84в†’# - redis:6379
    85в†’# - minio:9000 (console: 9001)
    86в†’# - api:8000
    87в†’# - websocket:8001
    88в†’# - frontend:3000
    89в†’```
    90в†’
    91в†’## Database
    92в†’
    93в†’### Migrations
    94в†’```bash
    95в†’bun run db:migrate              # Run pending
    96в†’bun run db:migrate:status       # Check status
    97в†’bun run db:rollback             # Rollback last
    98в†’```
    99в†’
   100в†’### Drizzle Studio
   101в†’```bash
   102в†’bun run db:studio               # Opens at localhost:4983
   103в†’```
   104в†’
   105в†’### Direct Access
   106в†’```bash
   107в†’docker exec -it mms-postgres psql -U mms -d mms_dev
   108в†’```
   109в†’
   110в†’## Environment Variables
   111в†’
   112в†’```bash
   113в†’# Required
   114в†’DATABASE_URL=postgresql://mms:mms@localhost:5432/mms_dev
   115в†’REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379
   116в†’MINIO_ENDPOINT=localhost:9000
   117в†’MINIO_ACCESS_KEY=mms
   118в†’MINIO_SECRET_KEY=mms_secret
   119в†’
   120в†’# Optional
   121в†’LOG_LEVEL=debug
   122в†’OPTIMIZER_PATH=./src/optimizer/build/mms-optimizer
   123в†’MAXIMO_API_URL=http://maximo.example.com/api
   124в†’```
   125в†’
   126в†’## Codebase Patterns
   127в†’
   128в†’### Domain Services
   129в†’- Location: `src/services/`
   130в†’- Pattern: Class with injected dependencies
   131в†’- All services emit OpenTelemetry traces
   132в†’- Use Drizzle ORM for database access
   133в†’
   134в†’### API Routes
   135в†’- Location: `src/api/routes/`
   136в†’- Framework: Hono
   137в†’- All routes have OpenAPI spec
   138в†’- Use Zod for validation
   139в†’
   140в†’### Workers
   141в†’- Location: `src/workers/`
   142в†’- Framework: BullMQ
   143в†’- Each worker is a separate file
   144в†’- Concurrency defined in worker config
   145в†’
   146в†’### Optimizer IPC
   147в†’- Protocol: NDJSON over stdin/stdout
   148в†’- Input: `{ type: "solve", data: {...} }`
   149в†’- Output: `{ type: "progress" | "solution" | "error", ... }`
   150в†’
   151в†’## Common Issues
   152в†’
   153в†’### Port conflicts
   154в†’```bash
   155в†’lsof -i :5432  # Check postgres
   156в†’lsof -i :6379  # Check redis
   157в†’```
   158в†’
   159в†’### Database connection
   160в†’```bash
   161в†’# Reset completely
   162в†’docker-compose down -v
   163в†’docker-compose up -d postgres
   164в†’bun run db:migrate
   165в†’```
   166в†’
   167в†’### Optimizer not found
   168в†’```bash
   169в†’# Check binary exists
   170в†’ls -la src/optimizer/build/mms-optimizer
   171в†’
   172в†’# Rebuild if needed
   173в†’cd src/optimizer/build && make clean && make
   174в†’```
   175в†’

# MMS Operational Guide

## Quick Reference

```bash
# Full stack (dev)
docker-compose up -d
bun run dev

# Tests
bun test                    # Unit tests
bun test:watch             # Watch mode
bun run test:integration   # Integration (needs Docker)

# Validation (run in order!)
bun run typecheck          # TypeScript strict
bun run lint               # ESLint
bun run build              # Full build
```

## Validation Order (Backpressure)

**IMPORTANT: Run these in order after implementing changes:**

```bash
# 1. Unit tests for changed files
bun test <path-to-changed-file>

# 2. TypeScript type checking
bun run typecheck

# 3. Linting
bun run lint

# 4. Full build
bun run build

# 5. Integration tests (if touching API/DB)
bun run test:integration
```

All must pass before committing.

## Build & Run

### Development Environment

```bash
# Start infrastructure
docker-compose up -d postgres redis minio

# Install dependencies
bun install

# Run migrations
bun run db:migrate

# Seed demo data (optional)
bun run db:seed

# Start dev server
bun run dev
```

### C++ Optimizer Build

```bash
# Prerequisites: cmake, or-tools
cd src/optimizer
mkdir build && cd build
cmake .. -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release
make -j$(nproc)

# Binary location: src/optimizer/build/mms-optimizer
```

### Docker Full Stack

```bash
docker-compose -f docker-compose.full.yml up -d

# Services:
# - postgres:5432
# - redis:6379
# - minio:9000 (console: 9001)
# - api:8000
# - websocket:8001
# - frontend:3000
```

## Database

### Migrations
```bash
bun run db:migrate              # Run pending
bun run db:migrate:status       # Check status
bun run db:rollback             # Rollback last
```

### Drizzle Studio
```bash
bun run db:studio               # Opens at localhost:4983
```

### Direct Access
```bash
docker exec -it mms-postgres psql -U mms -d mms_dev
```

## Environment Variables

```bash
# Required
DATABASE_URL=postgresql://mms:mms@localhost:5432/mms_dev
REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379
MINIO_ENDPOINT=localhost:9000
MINIO_ACCESS_KEY=mms
MINIO_SECRET_KEY=mms_secret

# Optional
LOG_LEVEL=debug
OPTIMIZER_PATH=./src/optimizer/build/mms-optimizer
MAXIMO_API_URL=http://maximo.example.com/api
```

## Codebase Patterns

### Domain Services
- Location: `src/services/`
- Pattern: Class with injected dependencies
- All services emit OpenTelemetry traces
- Use Drizzle ORM for database access

### API Routes
- Location: `src/api/routes/`
- Framework: Hono
- All routes have OpenAPI spec
- Use Zod for validation

### Workers
- Location: `src/workers/`
- Framework: BullMQ
- Each worker is a separate file
- Concurrency defined in worker config

### Optimizer IPC
- Protocol: NDJSON over stdin/stdout
- Input: `{ type: "solve", data: {...} }`
- Output: `{ type: "progress" | "solution" | "error", ... }`

## Common Issues

### Port conflicts
```bash
lsof -i :5432  # Check postgres
lsof -i :6379  # Check redis
```

### Database connection
```bash
# Reset completely
docker-compose down -v
docker-compose up -d postgres
bun run db:migrate
```

### Optimizer not found
```bash
# Check binary exists
ls -la src/optimizer/build/mms-optimizer

# Rebuild if needed
cd src/optimizer/build && make clean && make
```

#!/bin/bash
# =============================================================================
# Ralph Wiggum Setup Script for MMS v2.1
# =============================================================================
# This script prepares the MMS project to use the Ralph Wiggum methodology.
#
# Improvements v2.1:
# - All scripts made executable
# - jq installation check
# - Claude CLI settings.json configuration guidance
# - Timeout configuration guidance
#
# Usage:
#   chmod +x setup.sh
#   ./setup.sh
# =============================================================================

set -euo pipefail

# Colors
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
BLUE='\033[0;34m'
CYAN='\033[0;36m'
NC='\033[0m'

log_info() { echo -e "${CYAN}[INFO]${NC} $1"; }
log_success() { echo -e "${GREEN}[SUCCESS]${NC} $1"; }
log_warn() { echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} $1"; }

    27в†’# =============================================================================

    41в†’

    60в†’# =============================================================================

    62в†’# =============================================================================
    63в†’# Claude CLI has a default 2-minute timeout on bash commands.
    64в†’# This will kill long-running builds, tests, and optimizer runs!
    65в†’# Configure these environment variables to extend timeouts.
    66в†’#
    67в†’# Reference: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/5615
    68в†’# =============================================================================
    69в†’
    70в†’# Bash command timeout (ms) - default 30 minutes
    71в†’export BASH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS=${BASH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS:-1800000}
    72в†’# Maximum bash timeout (ms) - default 2 hours
    73в†’export BASH_MAX_TIMEOUT_MS=${BASH_MAX_TIMEOUT_MS:-7200000}
    74в†’# API request timeout (ms) - default 10 minutes
    75в†’export API_TIMEOUT_MS=${API_TIMEOUT_MS:-600000}
    76в†’# MCP server startup timeout (ms) - default 30 seconds
    77в†’export MCP_TIMEOUT=${MCP_TIMEOUT:-30000}

    80в†’
    81в†’# Retry configuration for Claude CLI calls
    82в†’MAX_RETRIES=${MAX_RETRIES:-3}
    83в†’RETRY_DELAY=${RETRY_DELAY:-5}
    84в†’
    85в†’# Completion signals to detect
    86в†’COMPLETION_SIGNALS=(
    87в†’    "ALL_TASKS_COMPLETE"
    88в†’    "PLAN_COMPLETE"
    89в†’    "EXIT_SIGNAL"
    90в†’    "<promise>DONE</promise>"

    92в†’    "<promise>ALL_TASKS_COMPLETE</promise>"

    94в†’)
    95в†’
    96в†’# =============================================================================
    97в†’# HELPER FUNCTIONS
    98в†’# =============================================================================
    99в†’

   109в†’    echo "в•‘     в–€в–€в•”в•ђв•ђв–€в–€в•—в–€в–€в•”в•ђв•ђв–€в–€в•—в–€в–€в•‘     в–€в–€в•”в•ђв•ђв–€в–€в•—в–€в–€в•‘  в–€в–€в•‘                     в•‘"
   110в†’    echo "в•‘     в–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в•”в•ќв–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в•‘в–€в–€в•‘     в–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в•”в•ќв–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в•‘                     в•‘"
   111в†’    echo "в•‘     в–€в–€в•”в•ђв•ђв–€в–€в•—в–€в–€в•”в•ђв•ђв–€в–€в•‘в–€в–€в•‘     в–€в–€в•”в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ќ в–€в–€в•”в•ђв•ђв–€в–€в•‘                     в•‘"
   112в†’    echo "в•‘     в–€в–€в•‘  в–€в–€в•‘в–€в–€в•‘  в–€в–€в•‘в–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в•—в–€в–€в•‘     в–€в–€в•‘  в–€в–€в•‘                     в•‘"
   113в†’    echo "в•‘     в•љв•ђв•ќ  в•љв•ђв•ќв•љв•ђв•ќ  в•љв•ђв•ќв•љв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ќв•љв•ђв•ќ     в•љв•ђв•ќ  в•љв•ђв•ќ                     в•‘"
   114в†’    echo "в•‘                                                                  в•‘"
   115в†’    echo "в•‘     Metro Fleet Mileage Management System                        в•‘"
   116в†’    echo "в•‘     Production-Hardened Ralph Loop v2.1                          в•‘"
   117в†’    echo "в•љв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ќ"
   118в†’    echo -e "${NC}"
   119в†’}
   120в†’
   121в†’# Cross-platform date from timestamp
   122в†’date_from_timestamp() {
   123в†’    local timestamp="$1"
   124в†’    if date --version >/dev/null 2>&1; then
   125в†’        # GNU date (Linux)

   131в†’}

   183в†’check_completion_signal() {

   187в†’        if grep -q "$signal" "$output_file" 2>/dev/null; then

   196в†’check_for_errors() {
   197в†’    local output_file="$1"

   199в†’    # Check for JSON error blocks
   200в†’    if grep -q '"type":"error"' "$output_file" 2>/dev/null; then
   201в†’        grep '"type":"error"' "$output_file" | head -1
   202в†’        return 0
   203в†’    fi
   204в†’    
   205в†’    # Check for common error patterns
   206в†’    if grep -qE "FATAL|CRITICAL|Exception|Traceback" "$output_file" 2>/dev/null; then
   207в†’        grep -E "FATAL|CRITICAL|Exception|Traceback" "$output_file" | head -1
   208в†’        return 0
   209в†’    fi
   210в†’    
   211в†’    # Check for API timeout errors
   212в†’    if grep -qE "timeout|ETIMEDOUT|Request timed out" "$output_file" 2>/dev/null; then
   213в†’        grep -E "timeout|ETIMEDOUT|Request timed out" "$output_file" | head -1
   214в†’        return 0
   215в†’    fi
   216в†’    
   217в†’    return 1
   218в†’}

   220в†’push_changes() {
   221в†’    local branch="$1"
   222в†’    local max_retries=3
   223в†’    local retry=0
   224в†’    
   225в†’    while [[ $retry -lt $max_retries ]]; do
   226в†’        if git push origin "$branch" 2>&1; then
   227в†’            return 0
   228в†’        fi
   229в†’        
   230в†’        retry=$((retry + 1))
   231в†’        
   232в†’        if [[ $retry -eq 1 ]]; then
   233в†’            log_warn "Push failed. Trying to create remote branch..."
   234в†’            if git push -u origin "$branch" 2>&1; then
   235в†’                return 0
   236в†’            fi
   237в†’        fi
   238в†’        
   239в†’        log_warn "Push attempt $retry/$max_retries failed. Retrying in 5s..."
   240в†’        sleep 5
   241в†’    done
   242в†’    
   243в†’    return 1
   244в†’}

   246в†’# Run Claude CLI with retry logic for transient failures
   247в†’run_claude_with_retry() {
   248в†’    local prompt_file="$1"
   249в†’    local output_file="$2"
   250в†’    local mode="$3"
   251в†’    local retry=0
   252в†’    local exit_code
   253в†’    
   254в†’    while [[ $retry -lt $MAX_RETRIES ]]; do
   255в†’        if [[ "$mode" == "plan-work" ]]; then
   256в†’            envsubst < "$prompt_file" | claude -p \
   257в†’                --dangerously-skip-permissions \
   258в†’                --output-format=stream-json \
   259в†’                --model "$MODEL" \
   260в†’                $VERBOSE 2>&1 | tee "$output_file"
   261в†’            exit_code=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
   262в†’        else
   263в†’            cat "$prompt_file" | claude -p \
   264в†’                --dangerously-skip-permissions \
   265в†’                --output-format=stream-json \
   266в†’                --model "$MODEL" \
   267в†’                $VERBOSE 2>&1 | tee "$output_file"
   268в†’            exit_code=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
   269в†’        fi
   270в†’        
   271в†’        # Check for transient errors that should be retried
   272в†’        if [[ $exit_code -eq 0 ]]; then
   273в†’            return 0
   274в†’        fi
   275в†’        
   276в†’        # Check if it's a retryable error
   277в†’        if grep -qE "ETIMEDOUT|ECONNRESET|ECONNREFUSED|503|504|rate.?limit" "$output_file" 2>/dev/null; then
   278в†’            retry=$((retry + 1))
   279в†’            if [[ $retry -lt $MAX_RETRIES ]]; then
   280в†’                log_warn "Transient error detected. Retrying in ${RETRY_DELAY}s... (attempt $((retry + 1))/$MAX_RETRIES)"
   281в†’                sleep "$RETRY_DELAY"
   282в†’                continue
   283в†’            fi
   284в†’        fi
   285в†’        
   286в†’        # Non-retryable error or max retries reached
   287в†’        return $exit_code
   288в†’    done
   289в†’    
   290в†’    return 1
   291в†’}

#!/bin/bash
# =============================================================================
# Ralph Wiggum Loop - Production Hardened Version 2.1
# =============================================================================
# Based on Geoffrey Huntley's ORIGINAL method (external loop, clean context)
# 
# CRITICAL FIXES v2.1:
# 1. Claude CLI timeout configuration (CRITICAL - prevents 2-min kill)
# 2. API timeout configuration
# 3. Retry logic for transient failures
# 4. Cross-platform date compatibility (Linux/macOS)
# 5. bc dependency fallback
# 6. Fixed variable scope issues
# 7. Improved error handling
# =============================================================================

set -euo pipefail

# Colors for output
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
BLUE='\033[0;34m'
CYAN='\033[0;36m'
NC='\033[0m'

# =============================================================================
# CONFIGURATION
# =============================================================================
SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
PROJECT_ROOT="$(dirname "$SCRIPT_DIR")"

# Source circuit breaker
if [[ -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/circuit-breaker.sh" ]]; then
    source "$SCRIPT_DIR/circuit-breaker.sh"
    CB_ENABLED=true
else
    CB_ENABLED=false
    echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} circuit-breaker.sh not found - running without protection"
fi

# Ralph files
PROMPT_BUILD="${SCRIPT_DIR}/PROMPT_build.md"
PROMPT_PLAN="${SCRIPT_DIR}/PROMPT_plan.md"
PROMPT_PLAN_WORK="${SCRIPT_DIR}/PROMPT_plan_work.md"
AGENTS_FILE="${SCRIPT_DIR}/AGENTS.md"
IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN="${SCRIPT_DIR}/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md"

# Default model
DEFAULT_MODEL="opus"

# Rate limiting
MAX_CALLS_PER_HOUR=${MAX_CALLS_PER_HOUR:-100}
CALLS_FILE="/tmp/ralph-calls-$(date +%Y%m%d%H)"

# Output capture
OUTPUT_DIR="/tmp/ralph-outputs-$$"
mkdir -p "$OUTPUT_DIR"

# =============================================================================
# TIMEOUT CONFIGURATION (CRITICAL)
# =============================================================================
# Claude CLI has a default 2-minute timeout on bash commands.
# This will kill long-running builds, tests, and optimizer runs!
# Configure these environment variables to extend timeouts.
#
# Reference: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/5615
# =============================================================================

# Bash command timeout (ms) - default 30 minutes
export BASH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS=${BASH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS:-1800000}
# Maximum bash timeout (ms) - default 2 hours
export BASH_MAX_TIMEOUT_MS=${BASH_MAX_TIMEOUT_MS:-7200000}
# API request timeout (ms) - default 10 minutes
export API_TIMEOUT_MS=${API_TIMEOUT_MS:-600000}
# MCP server startup timeout (ms) - default 30 seconds
export MCP_TIMEOUT=${MCP_TIMEOUT:-30000}
# Disable non-essential traffic (improves stability)
export CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC=${CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC:-1}

# Retry configuration for Claude CLI calls
MAX_RETRIES=${MAX_RETRIES:-3}
RETRY_DELAY=${RETRY_DELAY:-5}

# Completion signals to detect
COMPLETION_SIGNALS=(
    "ALL_TASKS_COMPLETE"
    "PLAN_COMPLETE"
    "EXIT_SIGNAL"
    "<promise>DONE</promise>"
    "<promise>COMPLETE</promise>"
    "<promise>ALL_TASKS_COMPLETE</promise>"
    "<promise>PLAN_COMPLETE</promise>"
)

# =============================================================================
# HELPER FUNCTIONS
# =============================================================================

log_info() { echo -e "${CYAN}[INFO]${NC} $1"; }
log_success() { echo -e "${GREEN}[SUCCESS]${NC} $1"; }
log_warn() { echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} $1"; }
log_error() { echo -e "${RED}[ERROR]${NC} $1"; }

print_banner() {
    echo -e "${BLUE}"
    echo "в•”в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•—"
    echo "в•‘     в–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в•—  в–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в•— в–€в–€в•—     в–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в•— в–€в–€в•—  в–€в–€в•—                     в•‘"
    echo "в•‘     в–€в–€в•”в•ђв•ђв–€в–€в•—в–€в–€в•”в•ђв•ђв–€в–€в•—в–€в–€в•‘     в–€в–€в•”в•ђв•ђв–€в–€в•—в–€в–€в•‘  в–€в–€в•‘                     в•‘"
    echo "в•‘     в–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в•”в•ќв–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в•‘в–€в–€в•‘     в–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в•”в•ќв–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в•‘                     в•‘"
    echo "в•‘     в–€в–€в•”в•ђв•ђв–€в–€в•—в–€в–€в•”в•ђв•ђв–€в–€в•‘в–€в–€в•‘     в–€в–€в•”в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ќ в–€в–€в•”в•ђв•ђв–€в–€в•‘                     в•‘"
    echo "в•‘     в–€в–€в•‘  в–€в–€в•‘в–€в–€в•‘  в–€в–€в•‘в–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в–€в•—в–€в–€в•‘     в–€в–€в•‘  в–€в–€в•‘                     в•‘"
    echo "в•‘     в•љв•ђв•ќ  в•љв•ђв•ќв•љв•ђв•ќ  в•љв•ђв•ќв•љв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ќв•љв•ђв•ќ     в•љв•ђв•ќ  в•љв•ђв•ќ                     в•‘"
    echo "в•‘                                                                  в•‘"
    echo "в•‘     Metro Fleet Mileage Management System                        в•‘"
    echo "в•‘     Production-Hardened Ralph Loop v2.1                          в•‘"
    echo "в•љв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ќ"
    echo -e "${NC}"
}

# Cross-platform date from timestamp
date_from_timestamp() {
    local timestamp="$1"
    if date --version >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        # GNU date (Linux)
        date -d "@$timestamp" '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S' 2>/dev/null || echo "N/A"
    else
        # BSD date (macOS)
        date -r "$timestamp" '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S' 2>/dev/null || echo "N/A"
    fi
}

check_rate_limit() {
    if [[ -f "$CALLS_FILE" ]]; then
        local calls
        calls=$(cat "$CALLS_FILE")
        if [[ $calls -ge $MAX_CALLS_PER_HOUR ]]; then
            log_error "Rate limit reached: $MAX_CALLS_PER_HOUR calls/hour"
            log_info "Reset in: $(( 60 - $(date +%M) )) minutes"
            return 1
        fi
    fi
    return 0
}

increment_call_count() {
    local current=0
    if [[ -f "$CALLS_FILE" ]]; then
        current=$(cat "$CALLS_FILE")
    fi
    echo $((current + 1)) > "$CALLS_FILE"
}

check_prerequisites() {
    if ! command -v claude &> /dev/null; then
        log_error "Claude CLI not found. Install: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-cli"
        exit 1
    fi

    if ! git rev-parse --git-dir &> /dev/null; then
        log_error "Not in a git repository"
        exit 1
    fi

    if [[ ! -f "$AGENTS_FILE" ]]; then
        log_error "AGENTS.md not found at: $AGENTS_FILE"
        exit 1
    fi
    
    # Check for jq (required for circuit breaker)
    if ! command -v jq &> /dev/null; then
        log_warn "jq not found - circuit breaker features limited"
        log_info "Install with: apt install jq (Linux) or brew install jq (macOS)"
    fi
    
    # Check for envsubst (required for plan-work mode)
    if ! command -v envsubst &> /dev/null; then
        log_warn "envsubst not found - plan-work mode may not work"
        log_info "Install with: apt install gettext-base (Linux) or brew install gettext (macOS)"
    fi
}

check_completion_signal() {
    local output_file="$1"
    
    for signal in "${COMPLETION_SIGNALS[@]}"; do
        if grep -q "$signal" "$output_file" 2>/dev/null; then
            echo "$signal"
            return 0
        fi
    done
    
    return 1
}

check_for_errors() {
    local output_file="$1"
    
    # Check for JSON error blocks
    if grep -q '"type":"error"' "$output_file" 2>/dev/null; then
        grep '"type":"error"' "$output_file" | head -1
        return 0
    fi
    
    # Check for common error patterns
    if grep -qE "FATAL|CRITICAL|Exception|Traceback" "$output_file" 2>/dev/null; then
        grep -E "FATAL|CRITICAL|Exception|Traceback" "$output_file" | head -1
        return 0
    fi
    
    # Check for API timeout errors
    if grep -qE "timeout|ETIMEDOUT|Request timed out" "$output_file" 2>/dev/null; then
        grep -E "timeout|ETIMEDOUT|Request timed out" "$output_file" | head -1
        return 0
    fi
    
    return 1
}

push_changes() {
    local branch="$1"
    local max_retries=3
    local retry=0
    
    while [[ $retry -lt $max_retries ]]; do
        if git push origin "$branch" 2>&1; then
            return 0
        fi
        
        retry=$((retry + 1))
        
        if [[ $retry -eq 1 ]]; then
            log_warn "Push failed. Trying to create remote branch..."
            if git push -u origin "$branch" 2>&1; then
                return 0
            fi
        fi
        
        log_warn "Push attempt $retry/$max_retries failed. Retrying in 5s..."
        sleep 5
    done
    
    return 1
}

# Run Claude CLI with retry logic for transient failures
run_claude_with_retry() {
    local prompt_file="$1"
    local output_file="$2"
    local mode="$3"
    local retry=0
    local exit_code
    
    while [[ $retry -lt $MAX_RETRIES ]]; do
        if [[ "$mode" == "plan-work" ]]; then
            envsubst < "$prompt_file" | claude -p \
                --dangerously-skip-permissions \
                --output-format=stream-json \
                --model "$MODEL" \
                $VERBOSE 2>&1 | tee "$output_file"
            exit_code=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
        else
            cat "$prompt_file" | claude -p \
                --dangerously-skip-permissions \
                --output-format=stream-json \
                --model "$MODEL" \
                $VERBOSE 2>&1 | tee "$output_file"
            exit_code=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
        fi
        
        # Check for transient errors that should be retried
        if [[ $exit_code -eq 0 ]]; then
            return 0
        fi
        
        # Check if it's a retryable error
        if grep -qE "ETIMEDOUT|ECONNRESET|ECONNREFUSED|503|504|rate.?limit" "$output_file" 2>/dev/null; then
            retry=$((retry + 1))
            if [[ $retry -lt $MAX_RETRIES ]]; then
                log_warn "Transient error detected. Retrying in ${RETRY_DELAY}s... (attempt $((retry + 1))/$MAX_RETRIES)"
                sleep "$RETRY_DELAY"
                continue
            fi
        fi
        
        # Non-retryable error or max retries reached
        return $exit_code
    done
    
    return 1
}

cleanup() {
    rm -rf "$OUTPUT_DIR"
    log_info "Cleaned up temporary files"
}

show_usage() {
    echo "Usage: ./loop.sh [MODE] [OPTIONS]"
    echo ""
    echo "Modes:"
    echo "  (none)              Build mode, unlimited iterations"
    echo "  <number>            Build mode, max N iterations"
    echo "  plan                Planning mode, unlimited"
    echo "  plan <number>       Planning mode, max N iterations"
    echo "  plan-work \"desc\"    Scoped planning for specific work"
    echo ""
    echo "Examples:"
    echo "  ./loop.sh                          # Build, unlimited"
    echo "  ./loop.sh 50                       # Build, max 50 iterations"
    echo "  ./loop.sh plan                     # Plan, unlimited"
    echo "  ./loop.sh plan 5                   # Plan, max 5 iterations"
    echo "  ./loop.sh plan-work \"ingestion\"    # Scoped plan"
    echo ""
    echo "Options:"
    echo "  -h, --help              Show this help"
    echo "  -m, --model MODEL       Use specific model (default: opus)"
    echo "  -v, --verbose           Verbose output"
    echo "  --no-push               Skip git push after iterations"
    echo "  --no-stop-on-complete   Continue even after completion signal"
    echo ""
    echo "Environment Variables:"
    echo "  MAX_CALLS_PER_HOUR          Rate limit (default: 100)"
    echo "  CB_MAX_COST_USD             Circuit breaker cost limit (default: 50)"
    echo "  CB_NO_PROGRESS_THRESHOLD    Iterations without commit (default: 3)"
    echo ""
    echo "Timeout Configuration (CRITICAL for long operations):"
    echo "  BASH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS     Bash command timeout (default: 1800000 = 30min)"
    echo "  BASH_MAX_TIMEOUT_MS         Max bash timeout (default: 7200000 = 2hr)"
    echo "  API_TIMEOUT_MS              API request timeout (default: 600000 = 10min)"
    echo ""
    echo "Safety:"
    echo "  Ctrl+C                  Stop the loop"
    echo "  git reset --hard        Revert uncommitted changes"
    echo "  ./circuit-breaker.sh reset  Reset circuit breaker state"
}

# =============================================================================
# PARSE ARGUMENTS
# =============================================================================

MODE="build"
PROMPT_FILE="$PROMPT_BUILD"
MAX_ITERATIONS=0
WORK_DESCRIPTION=""
MODEL="$DEFAULT_MODEL"
VERBOSE=""
NO_PUSH=false
STOP_ON_COMPLETE=true

while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
    case $1 in
        -h|--help)
            show_usage
            exit 0
            ;;
        -m|--model)
            MODEL="$2"
            shift 2
            ;;
        -v|--verbose)
            VERBOSE="--verbose"
            shift
            ;;
        --no-push)
            NO_PUSH=true
            shift
            ;;
        --no-stop-on-complete)
            STOP_ON_COMPLETE=false
            shift
            ;;
        plan)
            MODE="plan"
            PROMPT_FILE="$PROMPT_PLAN"
            shift
            if [[ $# -gt 0 && "$1" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
                MAX_ITERATIONS=$1
                shift
            fi
            ;;
        plan-work)
            MODE="plan-work"
            PROMPT_FILE="$PROMPT_PLAN_WORK"
            shift
            if [[ $# -gt 0 && ! "$1" =~ ^- ]]; then
                WORK_DESCRIPTION="$1"
                shift
            else
                log_error "plan-work requires a work description"
                echo "Usage: ./loop.sh plan-work \"description of work\""
                exit 1
            fi
            if [[ $# -gt 0 && "$1" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then
                MAX_ITERATIONS=$1
                shift
            else
                MAX_ITERATIONS=5
            fi
            ;;
        [0-9]*)
            MAX_ITERATIONS=$1
            shift
            ;;
        *)
            log_error "Unknown option: $1"
            show_usage
            exit 1
            ;;
    esac
done

# =============================================================================
# VALIDATION
# =============================================================================

check_prerequisites

if [[ ! -f "$PROMPT_FILE" ]]; then
    log_error "Prompt file not found: $PROMPT_FILE"
    exit 1
fi

if [[ "$MODE" == "plan-work" ]]; then
    CURRENT_BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current)
    if [[ "$CURRENT_BRANCH" == "main" || "$CURRENT_BRANCH" == "master" ]]; then
        log_error "plan-work should be run on a work branch, not main/master"
        echo "Create a work branch first: git checkout -b ralph/your-work"
        exit 1
    fi
    export WORK_SCOPE="$WORK_DESCRIPTION"
fi

# Initialize circuit breaker
if [[ "$CB_ENABLED" == "true" ]]; then
    cb_init
    log_info "Circuit breaker initialized (cost limit: \$${CB_MAX_COST_USD:-50})"
fi

# =============================================================================
# MAIN LOOP
# =============================================================================

print_banner

CURRENT_BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current)
ITERATION=0
START_TIME=$(date +%s)

echo "в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ"
log_info "Mode:       ${YELLOW}$MODE${NC}"
log_info "Branch:     ${CYAN}$CURRENT_BRANCH${NC}"
log_info "Prompt:     $PROMPT_FILE"
log_info "Model:      $MODEL"
[[ $MAX_ITERATIONS -gt 0 ]] && log_info "Max:        $MAX_ITERATIONS iterations"
[[ -n "$WORK_DESCRIPTION" ]] && log_info "Work:       $WORK_DESCRIPTION"
log_info "Circuit:    $([[ "$CB_ENABLED" == "true" ]] && echo "ENABLED" || echo "DISABLED")"
log_info "Auto-stop:  $([[ "$STOP_ON_COMPLETE" == "true" ]] && echo "on completion signal" || echo "manual only")"
log_info "Timeouts:   Bash=${BASH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS}ms API=${API_TIMEOUT_MS}ms"
echo "в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ"
echo ""

# Trap for cleanup
trap 'echo ""; log_warn "Loop interrupted by user"; cleanup; exit 130' INT TERM

while true; do
    # Check iteration limit
    if [[ $MAX_ITERATIONS -gt 0 && $ITERATION -ge $MAX_ITERATIONS ]]; then
        log_success "Reached max iterations: $MAX_ITERATIONS"
        
        if [[ "$MODE" == "plan-work" ]]; then
            echo ""
            echo "в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ"
            log_success "Scoped plan created for: $WORK_DESCRIPTION"
            log_info "To build, run: ./loop.sh 50"
            echo "в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ"
        fi
        break
    fi

    # Check rate limit
    if ! check_rate_limit; then
        log_error "Rate limit exceeded. Stopping."
        break
    fi

    # Check circuit breaker
    if [[ "$CB_ENABLED" == "true" ]]; then
        CB_RESULT=$(cb_check_circuit 2>&1) || {
            log_error "Circuit breaker OPEN: $CB_RESULT"
            echo ""
            cb_status
            echo ""
            log_info "To reset: ./circuit-breaker.sh reset"
            break
        }
    fi

    ITERATION=$((ITERATION + 1))
    ELAPSED=$(($(date +%s) - START_TIME))
    OUTPUT_FILE="$OUTPUT_DIR/iteration-$ITERATION.json"
    
    echo ""
    echo -e "${BLUE}в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ${NC}"
    echo -e "${BLUE}  ITERATION $ITERATION  в”‚  Elapsed: ${ELAPSED}s  в”‚  Branch: $CURRENT_BRANCH${NC}"
    if [[ "$CB_ENABLED" == "true" ]]; then
        cb_state=$(cb_get_state 2>/dev/null || echo '{}')
        cb_cost=$(echo "$cb_state" | jq -r '.estimated_cost // 0' 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
        echo -e "${BLUE}  Est. Cost: \$${cb_cost}  в”‚  Limit: \$${CB_MAX_COST_USD:-50}${NC}"
    fi
    echo -e "${BLUE}в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ${NC}"
    echo ""

    # ==========================================================================
    # CORE RALPH LOOP - Clean Context on Each Iteration
    # ==========================================================================

    ITER_START=$(date +%s)
    
    # Run Claude with retry logic
    run_claude_with_retry "$PROMPT_FILE" "$OUTPUT_FILE" "$MODE"

    ITER_END=$(date +%s)
    ITER_DURATION=$((ITER_END - ITER_START))
    
    # Record call for rate limiting
    increment_call_count

    # Record iteration for circuit breaker
    if [[ "$CB_ENABLED" == "true" ]]; then
        cb_record_iteration
    fi

    # Check for errors in output
    if ERROR_MSG=$(check_for_errors "$OUTPUT_FILE"); then
        log_warn "Error detected: $ERROR_MSG"
        if [[ "$CB_ENABLED" == "true" ]]; then
            cb_record_error "$ERROR_MSG"
        fi
    fi

    # Check for completion signals
    if [[ "$STOP_ON_COMPLETE" == "true" ]]; then
        if SIGNAL=$(check_completion_signal "$OUTPUT_FILE"); then
            log_success "Completion signal detected: $SIGNAL"
            
            # Push final changes before exit
            if [[ "$NO_PUSH" == "false" ]]; then
                CURRENT_BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current)
                push_changes "$CURRENT_BRANCH" || log_warn "Final push failed"
            fi
            
            break
        fi
    fi

    # Push changes
    if [[ "$NO_PUSH" == "false" ]]; then
        CURRENT_BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current)
        if ! push_changes "$CURRENT_BRANCH"; then
            log_error "CRITICAL: Cannot push to remote after 3 retries."
            log_error "Work is only local! Stopping to prevent data loss."
            log_info "Fix credentials and run: git push origin $CURRENT_BRANCH"
            break
        fi
    fi

    log_success "Iteration $ITERATION completed (${ITER_DURATION}s)"
done

# =============================================================================
# SUMMARY
# =============================================================================

cleanup

TOTAL_TIME=$(($(date +%s) - START_TIME))
echo ""
echo "в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ"
log_success "Ralph loop completed!"
log_info "Total iterations: $ITERATION"
log_info "Total time: ${TOTAL_TIME}s"
log_info "Avg time/iteration: $((TOTAL_TIME / (ITERATION > 0 ? ITERATION : 1)))s"

if [[ "$CB_ENABLED" == "true" ]]; then
    echo ""
    cb_status
fi

echo "в”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓв”Ѓ"

1в†’#!/bin/bash
     2в†’# =============================================================================
     3в†’# Ralph Wiggum Circuit Breaker - Production Version 2.1
     4в†’# =============================================================================
     5в†’# Prevents runaway loops and excessive API costs.
     6в†’#
     7в†’# Improvements v2.1:
     8в†’# - bc fallback to awk for systems without bc
     9в†’# - Cross-platform date compatibility (Linux/macOS)
    10в†’# - Improved error handling
    11в†’# - Better jq fallback
    12в†’#
    13в†’# Usage (standalone):
    14в†’#   ./circuit-breaker.sh status    # Show current state
    15в†’#   ./circuit-breaker.sh reset     # Reset all state
    16в†’#   ./circuit-breaker.sh check     # Check if circuit is open (exit 1 = open)
    17в†’#
    18в†’# Usage (sourced by loop.sh):
    19в†’#   source circuit-breaker.sh
    20в†’#   cb_init
    21в†’#   cb_check_circuit || exit 1
    22в†’#   cb_record_iteration
    23в†’#   cb_record_error "error message"
    24в†’#
    25в†’# The circuit opens when:
    26в†’# - No progress (git commits) for N iterations
    27в†’# - Same error repeated N times
    28в†’# - Estimated cost exceeds limit
    29в†’# =============================================================================
    30в†’
    31в†’# Configuration (can be overridden via environment)
    32в†’CB_NO_PROGRESS_THRESHOLD=${CB_NO_PROGRESS_THRESHOLD:-3}
    33в†’CB_SAME_ERROR_THRESHOLD=${CB_SAME_ERROR_THRESHOLD:-5}
    34в†’CB_MAX_COST_USD=${CB_MAX_COST_USD:-50}
    35в†’CB_STATE_DIR="${CB_STATE_DIR:-/tmp/ralph-circuit-breaker}"
    36в†’CB_STATE_FILE="${CB_STATE_DIR}/state.json"
    37в†’
    38в†’# Cost estimate per iteration (Opus model)
    39в†’# Input: ~5k tokens ($0.015/1k = $0.075)
    40в†’# Output: ~10k tokens ($0.075/1k = $0.75)
    41в†’# Subagents: ~$0.10 average
    42в†’# Total: ~$0.40-0.50 per iteration
    43в†’COST_PER_ITERATION=${COST_PER_ITERATION:-0.45}
    44в†’
    45в†’# Colors
    46в†’RED='\033[0;31m'
    47в†’GREEN='\033[0;32m'
    48в†’YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
    49в†’CYAN='\033[0;36m'
    50в†’NC='\033[0m'
    51в†’
    52в†’# =============================================================================
    53в†’# UTILITY FUNCTIONS
    54в†’# =============================================================================
    55в†’
    56в†’# Safe floating point addition (bc or awk fallback)
    57в†’safe_add() {
    58в†’    local a="$1"
    59в†’    local b="$2"
    60в†’    if command -v bc &> /dev/null; then
    61в†’        echo "$a + $b" | bc -l 2>/dev/null || awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.4f\", $a + $b}"
    62в†’    else
    63в†’        awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.4f\", $a + $b}"
    64в†’    fi
    65в†’}
    66в†’
    67в†’# Safe floating point comparison (bc or awk fallback)
    68в†’safe_gte() {
    69в†’    local a="$1"
    70в†’    local b="$2"
    71в†’    if command -v bc &> /dev/null; then
    72в†’        [[ $(echo "$a >= $b" | bc -l 2>/dev/null || echo 0) -eq 1 ]]
    73в†’    else
    74в†’        awk "BEGIN {exit !($a >= $b)}"
    75в†’    fi
    76в†’}
    77в†’
    78в†’# Cross-platform date from timestamp
    79в†’date_from_timestamp() {
    80в†’    local timestamp="$1"
    81в†’    if date --version >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    82в†’        # GNU date (Linux)
    83в†’        date -d "@$timestamp" '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S' 2>/dev/null || echo "N/A"
    84в†’    else
    85в†’        # BSD date (macOS)
    86в†’        date -r "$timestamp" '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S' 2>/dev/null || echo "N/A"
    87в†’    fi
    88в†’}
    89в†’
    90в†’# Cross-platform ISO date
    91в†’iso_date() {
    92в†’    if date --version >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    93в†’        # GNU date
    94в†’        date -Iseconds 2>/dev/null || date '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z'
    95в†’    else
    96в†’        # BSD date (macOS)
    97в†’        date '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z'
    98в†’    fi
    99в†’}
   100в†’
   101в†’# Check if jq is available
   102в†’has_jq() {
   103в†’    command -v jq &> /dev/null
   104в†’}
   105в†’
   106в†’# =============================================================================
   107в†’# CORE FUNCTIONS
   108в†’# =============================================================================
   109в†’
   110в†’cb_init() {
   111в†’    mkdir -p "$CB_STATE_DIR"
   112в†’    if [[ ! -f "$CB_STATE_FILE" ]]; then
   113в†’        local start_time
   114в†’        start_time=$(date +%s)
   115в†’        
   116в†’        if has_jq; then
   117в†’            echo '{
   118в†’                "iterations": 0,
   119в†’                "last_commit": "",
   120в†’                "no_progress_count": 0,
   121в†’                "errors": [],
   122в†’                "estimated_cost": 0,
   123в†’                "start_time": '"$start_time"',
   124в†’                "session_id": "'$$'"
   125в†’            }' | jq '.' > "$CB_STATE_FILE"
   126в†’        else
   127в†’            # Fallback without jq
   128в†’            cat > "$CB_STATE_FILE" << EOF
   129в†’{
   130в†’    "iterations": 0,
   131в†’    "last_commit": "",
   132в†’    "no_progress_count": 0,
   133в†’    "errors": [],
   134в†’    "estimated_cost": 0,
   135в†’    "start_time": $start_time,
   136в†’    "session_id": "$$"
   137в†’}
   138в†’EOF
   139в†’        fi
   140в†’    fi
   141в†’}
   142в†’
   143в†’cb_get_state() {
   144в†’    if [[ ! -f "$CB_STATE_FILE" ]]; then
   145в†’        cb_init
   146в†’    fi
   147в†’    cat "$CB_STATE_FILE"
   148в†’}
   149в†’
   150в†’cb_update_state() {
   151в†’    local state="$1"
   152в†’    if has_jq; then
   153в†’        echo "$state" | jq '.' > "$CB_STATE_FILE"
   154в†’    else
   155в†’        echo "$state" > "$CB_STATE_FILE"
   156в†’    fi
   157в†’}
   158в†’
   159в†’cb_record_iteration() {
   160в†’    if ! has_jq; then
   161в†’        echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} jq not found - circuit breaker recording limited"
   162в†’        return 0
   163в†’    fi
   164в†’    
   165в†’    local state
   166в†’    state=$(cb_get_state)
   167в†’    local current_commit
   168в†’    current_commit=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "none")
   169в†’    local last_commit
   170в†’    last_commit=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '.last_commit')
   171в†’    local iterations
   172в†’    iterations=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '.iterations')
   173в†’    local no_progress
   174в†’    no_progress=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '.no_progress_count')
   175в†’    local cost
   176в†’    cost=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '.estimated_cost')
   177в†’    
   178в†’    iterations=$((iterations + 1))
   179в†’    cost=$(safe_add "$cost" "$COST_PER_ITERATION")
   180в†’    
   181в†’    if [[ "$current_commit" == "$last_commit" ]]; then
   182в†’        no_progress=$((no_progress + 1))
   183в†’    else
   184в†’        no_progress=0
   185в†’    fi
   186в†’    
   187в†’    state=$(echo "$state" | jq \
   188в†’        --arg commit "$current_commit" \
   189в†’        --argjson iter "$iterations" \
   190в†’        --argjson np "$no_progress" \
   191в†’        --arg cost "$cost" \
   192в†’        '.last_commit = $commit | .iterations = $iter | .no_progress_count = $np | .estimated_cost = ($cost | tonumber)')
   193в†’    
   194в†’    cb_update_state "$state"
   195в†’}
   196в†’
   197в†’cb_record_error() {
   198в†’    local error_msg="$1"
   199в†’    
   200в†’    if ! has_jq; then
   201в†’        echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} jq not found - error not recorded"
   202в†’        return 0
   203в†’    fi
   204в†’    
   205в†’    local state
   206в†’    state=$(cb_get_state)
   207в†’    local timestamp
   208в†’    timestamp=$(iso_date)
   209в†’    
   210в†’    # Create error object with timestamp
   211в†’    state=$(echo "$state" | jq \
   212в†’        --arg err "$error_msg" \
   213в†’        --arg ts "$timestamp" \
   214в†’        '.errors += [{"message": $err, "timestamp": $ts}] | .errors = .errors[-10:]')
   215в†’    
   216в†’    cb_update_state "$state"
   217в†’}
   218в†’
   219в†’cb_check_circuit() {
   220в†’    if ! has_jq; then
   221в†’        # Without jq, we can't properly check the circuit
   222в†’        # Fail open (allow execution) but warn
   223в†’        echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} jq not found - circuit check skipped" >&2
   224в†’        return 0
   225в†’    fi
   226в†’    
   227в†’    local state
   228в†’    state=$(cb_get_state)
   229в†’    local no_progress
   230в†’    no_progress=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '.no_progress_count')
   231в†’    local cost
   232в†’    cost=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '.estimated_cost')
   233в†’    local iterations
   234в†’    iterations=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '.iterations')
   235в†’    
   236в†’    # Check no progress
   237в†’    if [[ $no_progress -ge $CB_NO_PROGRESS_THRESHOLD ]]; then
   238в†’        echo "No progress for $no_progress iterations (threshold: $CB_NO_PROGRESS_THRESHOLD)"
   239в†’        return 1
   240в†’    fi
   241в†’    
   242в†’    # Check cost limit
   243в†’    if safe_gte "$cost" "$CB_MAX_COST_USD"; then
   244в†’        printf "Estimated cost \$%.2f exceeds limit \$%d\n" "$cost" "$CB_MAX_COST_USD"
   245в†’        return 1
   246в†’    fi
   247в†’    
   248в†’    # Check repeated errors (same error message 5+ times in last 10)
   249в†’    local error_messages
   250в†’    error_messages=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '[.errors[].message] | group_by(.) | map({message: .[0], count: length}) | sort_by(-.count) | .[0]')
   251в†’    local top_error_count
   252в†’    top_error_count=$(echo "$error_messages" | jq -r '.count // 0')
   253в†’    local top_error_msg
   254в†’    top_error_msg=$(echo "$error_messages" | jq -r '.message // "none"')
   255в†’    
   256в†’    if [[ $top_error_count -ge $CB_SAME_ERROR_THRESHOLD ]]; then
   257в†’        echo "Same error repeated $top_error_count times: $top_error_msg"
   258в†’        return 1
   259в†’    fi
   260в†’    
   261в†’    return 0
   262в†’}
   263в†’
   264в†’cb_status() {
   265в†’    if ! has_jq; then
   266в†’        echo -e "${CYAN}Circuit Breaker Status:${NC}"
   267в†’        echo "  jq not installed - detailed status unavailable"
   268в†’        echo "  State file: $CB_STATE_FILE"
   269в†’        [[ -f "$CB_STATE_FILE" ]] && echo "  Raw state: $(cat "$CB_STATE_FILE" | head -c 200)..."
   270в†’        return 0
   271в†’    fi
   272в†’    
   273в†’    local state
   274в†’    state=$(cb_get_state)
   275в†’    local iterations
   276в†’    iterations=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '.iterations')
   277в†’    local no_progress
   278в†’    no_progress=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '.no_progress_count')
   279в†’    local cost
   280в†’    cost=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '.estimated_cost')
   281в†’    local error_count
   282в†’    error_count=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '.errors | length')
   283в†’    local start_time
   284в†’    start_time=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '.start_time')
   285в†’    local elapsed
   286в†’    elapsed=$(($(date +%s) - start_time))
   287в†’    
   288в†’    echo -e "${CYAN}Circuit Breaker Status:${NC}"
   289в†’    echo "  Session start:   $(date_from_timestamp "$start_time")"
   290в†’    echo "  Elapsed:         ${elapsed}s"
   291в†’    echo "  Iterations:      $iterations"
   292в†’    echo "  No progress:     $no_progress / $CB_NO_PROGRESS_THRESHOLD"
   293в†’    printf "  Estimated cost:  \$%.2f / \$%d\n" "$cost" "$CB_MAX_COST_USD"
   294в†’    echo "  Recent errors:   $error_count"
   295в†’    
   296в†’    if cb_check_circuit > /dev/null 2>&1; then
   297в†’        echo -e "  Status:          ${GREEN}CLOSED (OK)${NC}"
   298в†’    else
   299в†’        echo -e "  Status:          ${RED}OPEN (BLOCKED)${NC}"
   300в†’        echo ""
   301в†’        echo -e "${YELLOW}Reason:${NC}"
   302в†’        cb_check_circuit 2>&1 | sed 's/^/  /'
   303в†’    fi
   304в†’}
   305в†’
   306в†’cb_reset() {
   307в†’    rm -f "$CB_STATE_FILE"
   308в†’    cb_init
   309в†’    echo -e "${GREEN}Circuit breaker reset${NC}"
   310в†’}
   311в†’
   312в†’cb_show_errors() {
   313в†’    if ! has_jq; then
   314в†’        echo -e "${CYAN}Recent Errors:${NC}"
   315в†’        echo "  jq not installed - cannot show errors"
   316в†’        return 0
   317в†’    fi
   318в†’    
   319в†’    local state
   320в†’    state=$(cb_get_state)
   321в†’    echo -e "${CYAN}Recent Errors:${NC}"
   322в†’    echo "$state" | jq -r '.errors[] | "  [\(.timestamp)] \(.message)"' 2>/dev/null || echo "  (none)"
   323в†’}
   324в†’
   325в†’# =============================================================================
   326в†’# MAIN (when executed directly)
   327в†’# =============================================================================
   328в†’
   329в†’if [[ "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}" == "${0}" ]]; then
   330в†’    case "${1:-status}" in
   331в†’        init)
   332в†’            cb_init
   333в†’            echo "Circuit breaker initialized"
   334в†’            ;;
   335в†’        record)
   336в†’            cb_record_iteration
   337в†’            echo "Iteration recorded"
   338в†’            ;;
   339в†’        error)
   340в†’            if [[ -z "$2" ]]; then
   341в†’                echo "Usage: $0 error \"error message\""
   342в†’                exit 1
   343в†’            fi
   344в†’            cb_record_error "$2"
   345в†’            echo "Error recorded"
   346в†’            ;;
   347в†’        check)
   348в†’            if cb_check_circuit; then
   349в†’                echo -e "${GREEN}Circuit CLOSED (OK to proceed)${NC}"
   350в†’                exit 0
   351в†’            else
   352в†’                echo -e "${RED}Circuit OPEN (blocked)${NC}"
   353в†’                exit 1
   354в†’            fi
   355в†’            ;;
   356в†’        status)
   357в†’            cb_status
   358в†’            ;;
   359в†’        errors)
   360в†’            cb_show_errors
   361в†’            ;;
   362в†’        reset)
   363в†’            cb_reset
   364в†’            ;;
   365в†’        *)
   366в†’            echo "Ralph Wiggum Circuit Breaker v2.1"
   367в†’            echo ""

#!/bin/bash
# =============================================================================
# Ralph Wiggum Circuit Breaker - Production Version 2.1
# =============================================================================
# Prevents runaway loops and excessive API costs.
#
# Improvements v2.1:
# - bc fallback to awk for systems without bc
# - Cross-platform date compatibility (Linux/macOS)
# - Improved error handling
# - Better jq fallback
#
# Usage (standalone):
#   ./circuit-breaker.sh status    # Show current state
#   ./circuit-breaker.sh reset     # Reset all state
#   ./circuit-breaker.sh check     # Check if circuit is open (exit 1 = open)
#
# Usage (sourced by loop.sh):
#   source circuit-breaker.sh
#   cb_init
#   cb_check_circuit || exit 1
#   cb_record_iteration
#   cb_record_error "error message"
#
# The circuit opens when:
# - No progress (git commits) for N iterations
# - Same error repeated N times
# - Estimated cost exceeds limit
# =============================================================================

# Configuration (can be overridden via environment)
CB_NO_PROGRESS_THRESHOLD=${CB_NO_PROGRESS_THRESHOLD:-3}
CB_SAME_ERROR_THRESHOLD=${CB_SAME_ERROR_THRESHOLD:-5}
CB_MAX_COST_USD=${CB_MAX_COST_USD:-50}
CB_STATE_DIR="${CB_STATE_DIR:-/tmp/ralph-circuit-breaker}"
CB_STATE_FILE="${CB_STATE_DIR}/state.json"

# Cost estimate per iteration (Opus model)
# Input: ~5k tokens ($0.015/1k = $0.075)
# Output: ~10k tokens ($0.075/1k = $0.75)
# Subagents: ~$0.10 average
# Total: ~$0.40-0.50 per iteration
COST_PER_ITERATION=${COST_PER_ITERATION:-0.45}

# Colors
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
CYAN='\033[0;36m'
NC='\033[0m'

# =============================================================================
# UTILITY FUNCTIONS
# =============================================================================

# Safe floating point addition (bc or awk fallback)
safe_add() {
    local a="$1"
    local b="$2"
    if command -v bc &> /dev/null; then
        echo "$a + $b" | bc -l 2>/dev/null || awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.4f\", $a + $b}"
    else
        awk "BEGIN {printf \"%.4f\", $a + $b}"
    fi
}

# Safe floating point comparison (bc or awk fallback)
safe_gte() {
    local a="$1"
    local b="$2"
    if command -v bc &> /dev/null; then
        [[ $(echo "$a >= $b" | bc -l 2>/dev/null || echo 0) -eq 1 ]]
    else
        awk "BEGIN {exit !($a >= $b)}"
    fi
}

# Cross-platform date from timestamp
date_from_timestamp() {
    local timestamp="$1"
    if date --version >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        # GNU date (Linux)
        date -d "@$timestamp" '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S' 2>/dev/null || echo "N/A"
    else
        # BSD date (macOS)
        date -r "$timestamp" '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S' 2>/dev/null || echo "N/A"
    fi
}

# Cross-platform ISO date
iso_date() {
    if date --version >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        # GNU date
        date -Iseconds 2>/dev/null || date '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z'
    else
        # BSD date (macOS)
        date '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z'
    fi
}

# Check if jq is available
has_jq() {
    command -v jq &> /dev/null
}

# =============================================================================
# CORE FUNCTIONS
# =============================================================================

cb_init() {
    mkdir -p "$CB_STATE_DIR"
    if [[ ! -f "$CB_STATE_FILE" ]]; then
        local start_time
        start_time=$(date +%s)
        
        if has_jq; then
            echo '{
                "iterations": 0,
                "last_commit": "",
                "no_progress_count": 0,
                "errors": [],
                "estimated_cost": 0,
                "start_time": '"$start_time"',
                "session_id": "'$$'"
            }' | jq '.' > "$CB_STATE_FILE"
        else
            # Fallback without jq
            cat > "$CB_STATE_FILE" << EOF
{
    "iterations": 0,
    "last_commit": "",
    "no_progress_count": 0,
    "errors": [],
    "estimated_cost": 0,
    "start_time": $start_time,
    "session_id": "$$"
}
EOF
        fi
    fi
}

cb_get_state() {
    if [[ ! -f "$CB_STATE_FILE" ]]; then
        cb_init
    fi
    cat "$CB_STATE_FILE"
}

cb_update_state() {
    local state="$1"
    if has_jq; then
        echo "$state" | jq '.' > "$CB_STATE_FILE"
    else
        echo "$state" > "$CB_STATE_FILE"
    fi
}

cb_record_iteration() {
    if ! has_jq; then
        echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} jq not found - circuit breaker recording limited"
        return 0
    fi
    
    local state
    state=$(cb_get_state)
    local current_commit
    current_commit=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo "none")
    local last_commit
    last_commit=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '.last_commit')
    local iterations
    iterations=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '.iterations')
    local no_progress
    no_progress=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '.no_progress_count')
    local cost
    cost=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '.estimated_cost')
    
    iterations=$((iterations + 1))
    cost=$(safe_add "$cost" "$COST_PER_ITERATION")
    
    if [[ "$current_commit" == "$last_commit" ]]; then
        no_progress=$((no_progress + 1))
    else
        no_progress=0
    fi
    
    state=$(echo "$state" | jq \
        --arg commit "$current_commit" \
        --argjson iter "$iterations" \
        --argjson np "$no_progress" \
        --arg cost "$cost" \
        '.last_commit = $commit | .iterations = $iter | .no_progress_count = $np | .estimated_cost = ($cost | tonumber)')
    
    cb_update_state "$state"
}

cb_record_error() {
    local error_msg="$1"
    
    if ! has_jq; then
        echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} jq not found - error not recorded"
        return 0
    fi
    
    local state
    state=$(cb_get_state)
    local timestamp
    timestamp=$(iso_date)
    
    # Create error object with timestamp
    state=$(echo "$state" | jq \
        --arg err "$error_msg" \
        --arg ts "$timestamp" \
        '.errors += [{"message": $err, "timestamp": $ts}] | .errors = .errors[-10:]')
    
    cb_update_state "$state"
}

cb_check_circuit() {
    if ! has_jq; then
        # Without jq, we can't properly check the circuit
        # Fail open (allow execution) but warn
        echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} jq not found - circuit check skipped" >&2
        return 0
    fi
    
    local state
    state=$(cb_get_state)
    local no_progress
    no_progress=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '.no_progress_count')
    local cost
    cost=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '.estimated_cost')
    local iterations
    iterations=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '.iterations')
    
    # Check no progress
    if [[ $no_progress -ge $CB_NO_PROGRESS_THRESHOLD ]]; then
        echo "No progress for $no_progress iterations (threshold: $CB_NO_PROGRESS_THRESHOLD)"
        return 1
    fi
    
    # Check cost limit
    if safe_gte "$cost" "$CB_MAX_COST_USD"; then
        printf "Estimated cost \$%.2f exceeds limit \$%d\n" "$cost" "$CB_MAX_COST_USD"
        return 1
    fi
    
    # Check repeated errors (same error message 5+ times in last 10)
    local error_messages
    error_messages=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '[.errors[].message] | group_by(.) | map({message: .[0], count: length}) | sort_by(-.count) | .[0]')
    local top_error_count
    top_error_count=$(echo "$error_messages" | jq -r '.count // 0')
    local top_error_msg
    top_error_msg=$(echo "$error_messages" | jq -r '.message // "none"')
    
    if [[ $top_error_count -ge $CB_SAME_ERROR_THRESHOLD ]]; then
        echo "Same error repeated $top_error_count times: $top_error_msg"
        return 1
    fi
    
    return 0
}

cb_status() {
    if ! has_jq; then
        echo -e "${CYAN}Circuit Breaker Status:${NC}"
        echo "  jq not installed - detailed status unavailable"
        echo "  State file: $CB_STATE_FILE"
        [[ -f "$CB_STATE_FILE" ]] && echo "  Raw state: $(cat "$CB_STATE_FILE" | head -c 200)..."
        return 0
    fi
    
    local state
    state=$(cb_get_state)
    local iterations
    iterations=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '.iterations')
    local no_progress
    no_progress=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '.no_progress_count')
    local cost
    cost=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '.estimated_cost')
    local error_count
    error_count=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '.errors | length')
    local start_time
    start_time=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '.start_time')
    local elapsed
    elapsed=$(($(date +%s) - start_time))
    
    echo -e "${CYAN}Circuit Breaker Status:${NC}"
    echo "  Session start:   $(date_from_timestamp "$start_time")"
    echo "  Elapsed:         ${elapsed}s"
    echo "  Iterations:      $iterations"
    echo "  No progress:     $no_progress / $CB_NO_PROGRESS_THRESHOLD"
    printf "  Estimated cost:  \$%.2f / \$%d\n" "$cost" "$CB_MAX_COST_USD"
    echo "  Recent errors:   $error_count"
    
    if cb_check_circuit > /dev/null 2>&1; then
        echo -e "  Status:          ${GREEN}CLOSED (OK)${NC}"
    else
        echo -e "  Status:          ${RED}OPEN (BLOCKED)${NC}"
        echo ""
        echo -e "${YELLOW}Reason:${NC}"
        cb_check_circuit 2>&1 | sed 's/^/  /'
    fi
}

cb_reset() {
    rm -f "$CB_STATE_FILE"
    cb_init
    echo -e "${GREEN}Circuit breaker reset${NC}"
}

cb_show_errors() {
    if ! has_jq; then
        echo -e "${CYAN}Recent Errors:${NC}"
        echo "  jq not installed - cannot show errors"
        return 0
    fi
    
    local state
    state=$(cb_get_state)
    echo -e "${CYAN}Recent Errors:${NC}"
    echo "$state" | jq -r '.errors[] | "  [\(.timestamp)] \(.message)"' 2>/dev/null || echo "  (none)"
}

# =============================================================================
# MAIN (when executed directly)
# =============================================================================

if [[ "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}" == "${0}" ]]; then
    case "${1:-status}" in
        init)
            cb_init
            echo "Circuit breaker initialized"
            ;;
        record)
            cb_record_iteration
            echo "Iteration recorded"
            ;;
        error)
            if [[ -z "$2" ]]; then
                echo "Usage: $0 error \"error message\""
                exit 1
            fi
            cb_record_error "$2"
            echo "Error recorded"
            ;;
        check)
            if cb_check_circuit; then
                echo -e "${GREEN}Circuit CLOSED (OK to proceed)${NC}"
                exit 0
            else
                echo -e "${RED}Circuit OPEN (blocked)${NC}"
                exit 1
            fi
            ;;
        status)
            cb_status
            ;;
        errors)
            cb_show_errors
            ;;
        reset)
            cb_reset
            ;;
        *)
            echo "Ralph Wiggum Circuit Breaker v2.1"
            echo ""
            echo "Usage: $0 [command]"
            echo ""
            echo "Commands:"
            echo "  status    Show current state (default)"
            echo "  check     Check if circuit is open (exit 1 = open)"
            echo "  reset     Reset all state"
            echo "  errors    Show recent errors"
            echo "  init      Initialize state file"
            echo "  record    Record an iteration"
            echo "  error MSG Record an error message"
            echo ""
            echo "Environment Variables:"
            echo "  CB_NO_PROGRESS_THRESHOLD  Iterations without commit (default: 3)"
            echo "  CB_SAME_ERROR_THRESHOLD   Repeated error count (default: 5)"
            echo "  CB_MAX_COST_USD           Cost limit in USD (default: 50)"
            echo "  COST_PER_ITERATION        Est. cost per iteration (default: 0.45)"
            exit 1
            ;;
    esac
fi

   158в†’dashboard() {

#!/bin/bash
# =============================================================================
# Ralph Wiggum Monitor - Real-Time Observation v2.1
# =============================================================================
# Monitors Ralph loop progress in a separate window.
#
# v2.1 Improvements:
# - Cross-platform date handling
# - Better error handling
# - Timeout status display
#
# Usage:
#   ./monitor.sh           # Dashboard mode (tmux)
#   ./monitor.sh stats     # Stats only
#   ./monitor.sh tail      # Follow logs
# =============================================================================

set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
PROJECT_ROOT="$(dirname "$SCRIPT_DIR")"

# Colors
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
BLUE='\033[0;34m'
CYAN='\033[0;36m'
NC='\033[0m'

# =============================================================================
# UTILITY FUNCTIONS
# =============================================================================

# Cross-platform date from timestamp
date_from_timestamp() {
    local timestamp="$1"
    if date --version >/dev/null 2>&1; then
        # GNU date (Linux)
        date -d "@$timestamp" '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S' 2>/dev/null || echo "N/A"
    else
        # BSD date (macOS)
        date -r "$timestamp" '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S' 2>/dev/null || echo "N/A"
    fi
}

# =============================================================================
# FUNCTIONS
# =============================================================================

show_stats() {
    echo -e "${CYAN}в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ${NC}"
    echo -e "${CYAN}  Ralph Wiggum Monitor v2.1 - MMS Project${NC}"
    echo -e "${CYAN}в•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђв•ђ${NC}"
    echo ""
    
    # Git stats
    echo -e "${BLUE}Git Status:${NC}"
    echo "  Branch:        $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'N/A')"
    echo "  Commits today: $(git log --since='00:00' --oneline 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ' || echo '0')"
    echo "  Last commit:   $(git log -1 --format='%h %s' 2>/dev/null || echo 'N/A')"
    echo ""
    
    # Timeout configuration
    echo -e "${BLUE}Timeout Configuration:${NC}"
    if [[ -n "${BASH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS:-}" ]]; then
        echo "  Bash timeout:  ${BASH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS}ms ($(( BASH_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS / 60000 )) min)"
    else
        echo "  Bash timeout:  ${YELLOW}NOT SET (using 2min default!)${NC}"
    fi
    if [[ -n "${API_TIMEOUT_MS:-}" ]]; then
        echo "  API timeout:   ${API_TIMEOUT_MS}ms ($(( API_TIMEOUT_MS / 60000 )) min)"
    else
        echo "  API timeout:   ${YELLOW}NOT SET${NC}"
    fi
    echo ""
    
    # Implementation plan stats
    if [[ -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md" ]]; then
        local total
        total=$(grep -c "^\- \[" "$SCRIPT_DIR/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
        local done
        done=$(grep -c "^\- \[x\]" "$SCRIPT_DIR/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
        local pending=$((total - done))
        local percent=0
        [[ $total -gt 0 ]] && percent=$((done * 100 / total))
        
        echo -e "${BLUE}Implementation Plan:${NC}"
        echo "  Total tasks:   $total"
        echo -e "  Completed:     ${GREEN}$done${NC}"
        echo -e "  Pending:       ${YELLOW}$pending${NC}"
        echo "  Progress:      $percent%"
        echo ""
    fi
    
    # Rate limiting
    local calls_file="/tmp/ralph-calls-$(date +%Y%m%d%H)"
    local calls=0
    [[ -f "$calls_file" ]] && calls=$(cat "$calls_file")
    echo -e "${BLUE}Rate Limiting:${NC}"
    echo "  Calls this hour: $calls / ${MAX_CALLS_PER_HOUR:-100}"
    echo "  Reset in:        $((60 - $(date +%M))) minutes"
    echo ""
    
    # Circuit breaker status
    if [[ -f "$SCRIPT_DIR/circuit-breaker.sh" ]]; then
        source "$SCRIPT_DIR/circuit-breaker.sh"
        echo -e "${BLUE}Circuit Breaker:${NC}"
        if command -v jq &> /dev/null && [[ -f "/tmp/ralph-circuit-breaker/state.json" ]]; then
            local state
            state=$(cat /tmp/ralph-circuit-breaker/state.json 2>/dev/null || echo '{}')
            local iterations
            iterations=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '.iterations // 0' 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
            local cost
            cost=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '.estimated_cost // 0' 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
            local no_progress
            no_progress=$(echo "$state" | jq -r '.no_progress_count // 0' 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
            
            echo "  Iterations:    $iterations"
            printf "  Est. cost:     \$%.2f / \$%d\n" "$cost" "${CB_MAX_COST_USD:-50}"
            echo "  No progress:   $no_progress / ${CB_NO_PROGRESS_THRESHOLD:-3}"
            
            if cb_check_circuit > /dev/null 2>&1; then
                echo -e "  Status:        ${GREEN}CLOSED (OK)${NC}"
            else
                echo -e "  Status:        ${RED}OPEN (BLOCKED)${NC}"
            fi
        else
            echo "  Status:        Not initialized or jq missing"
        fi
        echo ""
    fi
    
    # Docker status (if available)
    if command -v docker &> /dev/null; then
        echo -e "${BLUE}Docker Services:${NC}"
        docker ps --format "  {{.Names}}: {{.Status}}" 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo "  Docker not running"
        echo ""
    fi
    
    # Recent activity from IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md
    echo -e "${BLUE}Recent Completed Tasks:${NC}"
    grep "^\- \[x\]" "$SCRIPT_DIR/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md" 2>/dev/null | tail -5 | sed 's/^/  /' || echo "  None yet"
    echo ""
    
    # Next pending tasks
    echo -e "${BLUE}Next Pending Tasks:${NC}"
    grep "^\- \[ \].*P1:" "$SCRIPT_DIR/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md" 2>/dev/null | head -5 | sed 's/^/  /' || echo "  No P1 tasks found"
    echo ""
}

tail_logs() {
    echo -e "${CYAN}Following git log (Ctrl+C to stop)...${NC}"
    echo ""
    watch -n 5 "git log --oneline -20 2>/dev/null"
}

dashboard() {
    # Check if tmux is available
    if ! command -v tmux &> /dev/null; then
        echo "tmux not found. Install with: apt install tmux"
        echo "Falling back to stats mode..."
        while true; do
            clear
            show_stats
            sleep 10
        done
    fi
    
    # Create tmux session with dashboard layout
    local session="ralph-monitor"
    
    tmux kill-session -t "$session" 2>/dev/null || true
    
    tmux new-session -d -s "$session" -n "monitor"
    
    # Pane 0: Stats (updates every 10s)
    tmux send-keys -t "$session:0" "while true; do clear; $0 stats; sleep 10; done" Enter
    
    # Pane 1: Git log
    tmux split-window -t "$session:0" -h
    tmux send-keys -t "$session:0.1" "watch -n 5 'git log --oneline -15'" Enter
    
    # Pane 2: Implementation plan tail
    tmux split-window -t "$session:0.0" -v
    tmux send-keys -t "$session:0.2" "watch -n 5 'head -50 $SCRIPT_DIR/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md 2>/dev/null || echo \"No plan yet\"'" Enter
    
    # Pane 3: Docker logs (if available)
    tmux split-window -t "$session:0.1" -v
    tmux send-keys -t "$session:0.3" "docker logs -f ralph-sandbox 2>/dev/null || echo 'Waiting for container...'; sleep 5" Enter
    
    # Attach to session
    tmux attach -t "$session"
}

# =============================================================================
# MAIN
# =============================================================================

case "${1:-dashboard}" in
    stats)
        show_stats
        ;;
    tail)
        tail_logs
        ;;
    dashboard)
        dashboard
        ;;
    *)
        echo "Ralph Wiggum Monitor v2.1"
        echo ""
        echo "Usage: $0 [stats|tail|dashboard]"
        echo ""
        echo "Commands:"
        echo "  stats      Show current statistics (default for non-tmux)"
        echo "  tail       Follow git log"
        echo "  dashboard  Full tmux dashboard (default)"
        exit 1
        ;;
esac
